name: Figurine of Wondrous Power: Silver Raven
description: This silver statuette of a raven can become a Raven for up to 12 hours. Once it has been used, it can't be used again until 2 days have passed. While in raven form, the figurine grants you the ability to cast Animal Messenger on it.

properties.activation_type: throw to a point on the ground within 60 feet
